description: Import the WHO Tuberculosis Surveillance dataset from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TBData\who_tb_notifications.csv' into Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Transform the data by calculating 'TotalCases' as the sum of 'tb_cases_new' and 'tb_cases_relapse', and 'IncidenceRate' as ('TotalCases' / 'population') * 100000. Recode 'IncidenceRate' into a new variable 'IncidenceTier' with categories: "Low" (0 to <50), "Medium" (50 to <150), "High" (150 to <300), and "Very High" (300+). Filter the dataset to include only records where 'who_region' is "AFR" and 'year' is between 2015 and 2020 inclusive. Export the resulting dataset with the new variables to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TBData\output\afr_tb_2015_2020.csv' in CSV format.
